untranslatable_reason: Broadening Formation pattern detection requires multi-bar trend line identification and slope analysis. The signal requires: (1) identification of two points on upper trend line, (2) identification of two points on lower trend line, (3) confirmation that formation is broadening (widening volatility), and (4) precise turn point detection at bottom trend line. These structural pattern-matching operations cannot be expressed using only price, moving averages, and technical indicators from the allowed list. The measurement rule (height calculation between highs/lows across formation) also requires pattern-specific geometry analysis unavailable in standard indicators.
translation_notes: Signal requires chart pattern recognition beyond scope of indicator-based rules. Recommend implementing as a custom pattern detector or using machine learning-based pattern recognition module separate from indicator engine.
